---
title: 'Euphrates: Algorithm-SoC Co-Design for Low-Power Mobile Continuous Vision'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Anand Samajdar
- Matthew Mattina
- Paul Whatmough
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca18.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/algorithm-soc-co-design-for-mobile-continuous-vision
journ: ISCA
year: 2018
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4PxfmDPQ_uY
award: IEEE Micro Top Picks from Computer Architecture Conferences in 2018 (Honorable
  Mention)
pub_number: 23
---
